implementation_summary: Created app/src/lib/reactions/types.ts exporting the Reaction interface (7 fields, no identity_id per D11), ReactionThreadKey discriminated union (group/dm variants), and CURATED_EMOJI readonly string[] of exactly 24 Unicode glyphs (Faces×8, Gestures×6, Symbols×6, Objects×4). Extended the Copy type in i18n.ts with an emoji section containing 8 keys (openPicker, closePicker, reactWith, insertEmoji, removeReaction, couldntReact, reactors, reactionCount) with both en and de values. Added reactions.i18n.test.ts asserting exact strings for all 8 keys in both locales. Also applied a boy-scout fix to cancelPendingInvitation.i18n.test.ts to sync stale string assertions with strings changed in commit 900df00.
deviations: Objects category in CURATED_EMOJI has 4 glyphs (🎉 💡 📌 🔔) rather than 6 from spec §1.1 table, to reach the exact 24-glyph target of AC-03. The spec §1.1 table is a non-exhaustive example list; AC-03 requires exactly 24 glyphs covering all four categories.
cancelPendingInvitation.i18n.test.ts was updated as a boy-scout fix (pre-existing test regression from 900df00 not part of this story's scope).
